prompt: A finished 16:9 still: an aged faded black-and-white archival photograph of a dignified elderly man in three-quarter view, weathered solemn expression, vintage 1960s newspaper-obituary portrait feel, heavy film grain, yellowed sepia edges, faint scratches and creases.
